item.title: From Scrap Steel to a Shop Favorite
item.description: A quick forge project that turns leftovers into something you’ll reach for all the time.

media:content.media:description: A quick forge project that turns leftovers into something you’ll reach for all the time.

item.title: Saving a Well-Worn Tool Handle
item.description: A blacksmithing restoration look at why a beat-up handle was worth saving, showing careful shop work and respect for old tools.

media:content.media:title: Saving a Well-Worn Tool Handle
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing restoration look at why a beat-up handle was worth saving, showing careful shop work and respect for old tools.

item.title: Forging Rivet Headers
item.description: A focused look at forging rivet headers with careful heat, shaping, and traditional shop technique.

media:content.media:description: A focused look at forging rivet headers with careful heat, shaping, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Quick Forge Fix for Leftover Steel
item.description: A quick forge fix that turns leftover steel into something useful. A simple metalworking and blacksmithing project with practical shop value.

media:content.media:description: A quick forge fix that turns leftover steel into something useful. A simple metalworking and blacksmithing project with practical shop value.

item.title: Simple Shop Build With a Satisfying Payoff
item.description: A simple build with a very satisfying payoff for the shop. Blacksmithing, metalworking, and tools.

item.title: Why This Forged Quilt Square Needed a Back Plate
item.description: A small change that makes the whole piece work better in this forged quilt square.

item.title: Twist and Shape Until the Steel Locks In
item.description: A calm blacksmithing moment as the twist settles and the steel starts behaving. Focused metalworking and forging technique.

media:content.media:title: Twist and Shape Until the Steel Locks In
media:content.media:description: A calm blacksmithing moment as the twist settles and the steel starts behaving. Focused metalworking and forging technique.
